tools.name: createDashboard
tools.description: Create a new analytics dashboard with a name, type, and optional default filters.

tools.name: getDashboard
tools.description: Get a single dashboard by ID, including all its widgets and layout.

tools.name: saveDashboardLayout
tools.description: Save or update a personalized dashboard layout for a specific user.

tools.name: addWidget
tools.description: Add a widget to a dashboard with chart type, metric, dimensions, and filters.

tools.name: updateWidget
tools.description: Update any field of a widget by its widget ID.

tools.name: removeWidget
tools.description: Remove a widget from a dashboard by its widget ID.

tools.name: listWidgets
tools.description: List all widgets for a given dashboard.

tools.name: defineMetric
tools.description: Create a metric definition with a formula, aggregation method, display format, and optional thresholds.

tools.name: listMetrics
tools.description: List metric definitions, optionally filtered by category or active status.

tools.name: snapshotMetrics
tools.description: Get current metric values for a list of metric codes within a date range, including period-over-period change.

tools.name: getMetricHistory
tools.description: Get time-series data for a metric code over a 7-day, 30-day, or 90-day period.
